common_actions.description: Enter search query in search box
User selects option from dropdown menu

steps.code: String originalWindow = driver.getWindowHandle(); Set<String> handles = driver.getWindowHandles(); for(String handle : handles) { if(!handle.equals(originalWindow)) { driver.switchTo().window(handle); } }

common_actions.description: User hovers over menu to reveal submenu and clicks

steps.code: String errorMsg = driver.findElement(By.id("errorMessage")).getText(); assert errorMsg.equals("Please fill all required fields");
